## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor (behavior unchanged)
- [ ] Docs / CI / tooling

## Checklist

- [ ] `composer check` passes locally (lint + phpstan + phpunit)
- [ ] Tests added or updated for the changed behavior
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, or PII in the diff
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated under "Unreleased"
- [ ] If new record type or hook: README/CONTRIBUTING updated
